data.title: 21 Capital adjusts its corporate strategy: integrating mining and capital markets while continuing to increase its Bitcoin holdings.
data.description: Bitcoin treasury firm TwentyOne Capital announced an updated operational strategy for its "Bitcoin Company," proposing to integrate its Bitcoin reserves, mining, financial services, and capital markets businesses through mergers and acquisitions. Specifically, this includes: financial services and distribution, encompassing licensing, compliance, custody, technology, and institutional and retail client bases; Bitcoin infrastructure, mining BTC at low cost and with high hashrate to continuously expand Bitcoin reserves; capital markets strategy, securitizing loan books and mining revenues, and using operating cash flow to support non-dilutive leveraged financing for BTC reserves; and acquiring value-adding Bitcoin companies to continuously use cash flow to increase Bitcoin holdings. (Businesswire)

data.title: Meta Platforms Initiates Six-Part Bond Issuance
data.description: Meta Platforms has announced a six-part bond issuance, according to Jin10. The company aims to raise funds through this multi-tranche offering, which is expected to attract significant investor interest. Details regarding the specific terms and conditions of the bond issuance have not been disclosed yet. This move comes as Meta Platforms continues to expand its operations and invest in new technologies.

data.title: PayPal is restructuring its business architecture to include crypto as a separate core component, aiming to strengthen the PYUSD stablecoin ecosystem.
data.description: Payment giant PayPal has officially announced a strategic restructuring, simplifying its business into three core segments: Payments & Checkout and PayPal, Consumer Financial Services & Venmo, and Cryptocurrency & Payment Services. Cryptocurrency & Payment Services has been designated a separate core business unit, unifying payment processing, platform capabilities, and crypto operations, including Braintree, small and medium-sized merchant payment processing, value-added services, and the stablecoin PYUSD. Jeff Pomeroy has been appointed as the interim head of this segment. Analysts believe that incorporating cryptocurrency into its core operating structure signifies PayPal's further strengthening of its stablecoin PYUSD and digital asset payment ecosystem.

data.title: AIMCo Acquires $219 Million in Strategy Shares, Marking First Bitcoin-Related Investment
data.description: AIMCo, a Canadian government-owned investment manager overseeing $142 billion in assets, has made its initial foray into Bitcoin-related treasury assets. According to NS3.AI, AIMCo disclosed the acquisition of 1.38 million shares of Strategy, valued at $219 million. This purchase signifies AIMCo's first allocation toward Bitcoin-related investments.

data.title: Iran's Supreme Leader's advisor: Iran is not afraid of a naval blockade.
data.description: Mokhber, an advisor to Iran's Supreme Leader, posted on social media on the 30th that Iran controls the lifeline of global oil and gas transportation and is not afraid of a maritime blockade. He said, "When we control 20% of the world's oil and more than 18 trillion cubic meters of natural gas (transport routes), a maritime blockade will not send Iran back to the Stone Age, but it will certainly plunge the hegemonic regime into an ice age." (Xinhua)

data.title: Ark Invest purchased $39 million worth of Robinhood stock and sold $6 million worth of spot BTC ETF.
data.description: Ark Invest purchased $39 million worth of Robinhood stock and sold $6 million worth of spot BTC ETF. (Solid Intel)

data.title: JPMorgan Strategist: Investors May Misinterpret UK Market Risks
data.description: On April 30, JPMorgan Private Bank's Global Investment Strategist, Madison Faller, commented on the Bank of England's decision to maintain its current policy stance, stating that the move was expected. According to Jin10, Faller cautioned investors against conflating consensus with confidence, suggesting that the market might misinterpret the balance of risks. She emphasized that risks are bidirectional, and the rapid repricing from rate cuts to hikes indicates that investors might be overestimating inflation risks from energy shocks while underestimating the downside risks to growth. Faller advised that recent movements in UK government bonds, particularly in the short to mid-segment of the yield curve, and the British pound might be excessive. She recommended that investors should position themselves accordingly now, rather than chasing a hawkish narrative.

data.title: Poland's Central Bank Official: Rate Cut Opportunities Diminishing
data.description: A member of Poland's central bank monetary policy committee, Dabrowski, has stated that the chances for interest rate cuts are rapidly diminishing. According to Jin10, this statement reflects the current economic conditions and policy considerations within the central bank. The remarks suggest a shift in the bank's approach to monetary policy amid evolving economic circumstances.

data.title: MEGA opened at 0.2 USDT on OKX.
data.description: OKX market data shows that MEGA opened at 0.2 USDT.

data.title: AI Era Challenges SaaS Entrepreneurs with Limited Window for Innovation
data.description: The AI era is ushering in significant changes, presenting challenges for SaaS entrepreneurs. According to PANews, the commoditization of AI and the advent of intelligent agents are reshaping the landscape, leaving SaaS entrepreneurs with only an 18-month window to establish a substantial competitive advantage. This period is seen as crucial for building a true moat in the industry. The current transformation is described as a collapse and restructuring of opportunities, signaling a pivotal moment for those in the software sector.

data.title: AI TRENDS | AethirClaw Launches CARA with Advanced Crypto AI Capabilities
data.description:
AethirClaw has officially launched CARA, a pre-configured crypto AI agent, according to Odaily. CARA operates on Aethir's decentralized GPU infrastructure and is equipped with over 50 skills. These include real-time market monitoring, whale wallet tracking, on-chain analysis, social media sentiment monitoring, and project due diligence, all tailored for key crypto scenarios. Users can utilize CARA without any technical setup.

The platform supports multiple payment methods, including credit cards, USDT, USDC, and ATH tokens. Aethir also revealed plans to introduce a Model-as-a-Service (MaaS) layer soon. This will run mainstream open-source large models on Aethir's decentralized GPU infrastructure and expand capabilities to include text-to-image, video creation, and other multimodal functions.

data.title: Solana's Pacifica Platform Reaches New Milestones in Trading Volume
data.description:
Solana's decentralized trading platform, Pacifica, has achieved significant milestones in its ecosystem. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the platform distributed 10 million points this week, bringing the total to 333 million points.

The platform's core metrics have reached new highs, with the total trading volume surpassing $146 billion. Monthly trading volume has reached $10.3 billion, and the open interest in the past 24 hours stands at $86 million.

data.title: Bank of England Forecasts Inflation to Reach 3.6% by End of 2026
data.description: The Bank of England's Scenario A predicts that inflation will reach 3.6% by the end of 2026. According to Jin10, the forecast further anticipates a decrease in inflation to 1.7% by the second quarter of 2029.

data.title: Turkey's Central Bank Warns of Increased Inflation Uncertainty
data.description: Turkey's Central Bank has highlighted a significant rise in the uncertainty surrounding the inflation outlook. According to Jin10, the bank is closely monitoring developments and the impact of domestic energy prices on inflation projections.

data.title: Binance Launches ACU Trading Competition with $200,000 in Rewards
data.description:
Binance announced on X the commencement of the ACU trading competition on the Binance Alpha platform, offering participants a chance to share in $200,000 worth of rewards. To be eligible, users must click the 'Participate' button on the app's event page, as only successful registrations will count towards the competition's valid trading volume.

The competition introduces a new mechanism featuring an early bird bonus multiplier, where the earlier the trading begins, the higher the bonus. Transactions made on the first day will benefit from a 2.0x multiplier. The event will consider users' cumulative purchase volume during the competition period, with sales not contributing to the total. This initiative aims to incentivize early participation and increase trading activity on the platform.

data.title: AethirClaw introduces CARA, a pre-configured encrypted AI agent that can be deployed in just 5 minutes.
data.description: AethirClaw officially released CARA (Pre-configured Cryptographic AI Agent), running on Aethir's decentralized GPU infrastructure. It features over 50 built-in skills covering core crypto scenarios such as real-time market monitoring, whale wallet tracking, on-chain analytics, social media sentiment monitoring, and project due diligence. Users can use it out of the box without any technical configuration. The platform supports multiple payment methods including credit cards, USDT, USDC, and ATH tokens. Aethir also announced that it will soon launch a Model as a Service (MaaS) layer, running mainstream open-source large models on Aethir's decentralized GPU infrastructure and expanding multimodal capabilities such as text-to-image and video creation.

data.title: European Fuel Pipeline Network Disrupted Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: Military operations have disrupted parts of a vast European fuel pipeline network, exacerbating supply pressures linked to the ongoing conflict in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that a German service provider for the system reported the impact, highlighting the challenges faced by the region's energy infrastructure. The disruptions come at a critical time as Europe grapples with energy supply issues, further complicating the geopolitical landscape.

data.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Criticizes Foreign Influence in Gulf Region
data.description: Iran's Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, has stated that Iran's fate is intertwined with that of its Gulf neighbors. According to Odaily, Khamenei emphasized that 'malicious foreigners' have no place in the region and deserve to be cast into the depths. This statement was reported by Iranian media on April 30.

data.title: Standard Chartered Predicts $2 Trillion Tokenization Market by 2028
data.description: Standard Chartered has projected that the tokenization market could expand to $2 trillion by 2028, representing a growth of approximately 5,600%. According to NS3.AI, Geoffrey Kendrick highlighted that stablecoin-based decentralized finance (DeFi) lending is a significant factor driving this growth. The report also noted that recent incidents in the DeFi sector have not altered the positive long-term growth outlook.

data.title: MegaETH: MEGA tokens will be distributed before 19:00.
data.description: According to an official announcement from MegaETH, MEGA tokens will be distributed to users before 19:00 (UTC+8).
